headline: Woman's Freckles Have 'Moved' To Her Left Cheek, Right Cheek 'Feels Abandoned'
summary: The freckles are 'going through a phase' and 'considering rearranging themselves.'
fullBody: Amanda McFreckles has discovered her freckles have 'moved.' 'They're mostly on my left cheek now,' Amanda said. 'The right cheek feels abandoned.' The freckles are 'going through a phase' and 'considering rearranging.' Amanda is 'supporting their journey.' She's now 'freckle-fluid.'
